title: Trump’s Cuba policies have put a stranglehold over its economy
shortDescription: The Trump administration is wielding both a large stick and several carrots in negotiations with Cuba over the release of political prisoners.

title: New Pittsburgh law bans ICE from operating on some city property
shortDescription: Pittsburgh has banned Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents from operating on some city property.

title: Trump arrives in China. These 12 powerful CEOs are joining him
shortDescription: Trump lands in China with top CEOs for tense talks with Xi as U.S.–China ties remain strained

title: Trump gets red carpet welcome in Beijing for summit with President Xi
shortDescription: China rolled out a red carpet welcome for President Trump in Beijing, where he is set to meet Xi Jinping for two days of talks

title: How tall is Donald Trump? He joined in China by his even-taller son
shortDescription: President Donald Trump arrived in China on May 13 with a cohort of CEOs, family members and administration members. How tall is Trump and his son?

title: Trump lands in Beijing for talks with Xi
shortDescription: President Donald Trump arrived in Beijing to meet President Xi Jinping as trade, tech and global tensions shape talks.

title: See who Trump has endorsed in Texas ahead of GOP runoff elections
shortDescription: Donald Trump endorsed more than 130 candidates in Texas Republican primaries. See who made the runoff — and who Trump has and hasn't backed.

title: What to expect from Trump in China
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's visit to China will be overshadowed by the war in Iran and the continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Reactions from China ahead of Trump-Xi meeting
shortDescription: Residents expressed skepticism over President Donald Trump's trip to meet Xi Jinping in China for talks on trade and global issues.

title: Nebraska election results: Democrat wins, but plans to drop out

shortDescription: A US Senate race headlines West Virginia's May primary.

title: Trump says Iran must be stopped despite heavy cost of war
shortDescription: The president’s comments come as the latest federal statistics show inflation rose to its highest point in three years.

title: Burbank takes Dem Senate primary in Nebraska - but may now drop out
shortDescription: Cindy Burbank has pledged to drop out and endorse Dan Osborn, a populist independent. Pollsters say the former union president has a shot at unseating the GOP incumbent.

title: A 'big, fat hug?' What to expect from high-stakes Trump meeting in China
shortDescription: The last time Trump went to China, he was met with lots of pageantry. On this trip, the war in Iran and drama over the Strait of Hormuz could cause tension.

title: Senator introduces bill to rename major highway 'Trump Interstate'
shortDescription: A highway more than 1,700 miles long, stretching from Texas all the way to Montana, may soon be named after Donald Trump if this bill is passed.

title: Obama joins Texas Senate fight, supports Democrat Talarico
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama is backing Texas Democrat James Talarico in his bid for a U.S. Senate seat after being spotted in an Austin taco shop.

title: Group behind Epstein, Trump statues back with satire video game on Iran
shortDescription: The Secret Handshake has put up several statues in protest of the Trump administration. Now, they have functional arcade games about the war in Iran.

title: Trump says he’s not considering Americans’ money
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters that Americans' financial situations do not factor into decisions on Iran.

title: Trump says he's not thinking about Americans' finances in Iran talks
shortDescription: President Trump said he's only focused on preventing Iran from building a nuclear weapon, not the war's impact on Americans' financial situations.

title: Trump remarks on departure of FDA's Makary
shortDescription: President Trump would not comment on whether FDA chief Marty Makary was fired or asked to leave.
